fields.label: Locale Name
fields.description: Display name for the locale (e.g., English (United States), French (France))

fields.label: Locale Code
fields.description: BCP 47 locale code. Example: en_US, fr_FR, de_DE, zh_CN

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Enable or disable this locale for PIM content

fields.label: Is Default Locale
fields.description: Mark as default locale for fallback resolution

fields.label: Language Code
fields.description: ISO 639-1 two-letter language code. Example: en, fr, de, zh

fields.label: Country Code
fields.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Example: US, FR, DE, CN

fields.label: Script Code
fields.description: ISO 15924 script code for written form. Example: Latn, Hans, Hant, Arab

fields.label: Text Direction
fields.description: Text writing direction: Left-to-Right or Right-to-Left

fields.label: Date Format
fields.description: Date format pattern. Example: MM/DD/YYYY, DD.MM.YYYY, YYYY-MM-DD

fields.label: Time Format
fields.description: Time format pattern. Example: HH:mm, hh:mm a, HH:mm:ss

fields.label: Number Format
fields.description: Number format pattern for decimal and thousands separators

fields.label: Fallback Locale
fields.description: Locale to use when content is not available in this locale

fields.label: Content Priority
fields.description: Priority for content resolution. Higher values take precedence.

fields.label: Measurement System
fields.description: Default measurement system for this locale

fields.label: Temperature Unit
fields.description: Default temperature unit for this locale

fields.label: Products with Content
fields.description: Number of products with content in this locale (auto-calculated)

fields.label: Average Completeness
fields.description: Average content completeness for this locale (auto-calculated)
